archetype: Archetype 2 (The Performance Pro) mixed with Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast)

rules.groupLabels: text-[10px] uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-mono text-[#8F8F9D] pb-2
rules.navItems: text-sm font-medium text-[#8F8F9D] hover:text-white transition-colors tracking-wide

NavigationGroup.description: Collapsible section header. Needs to feel tactile. Flex row, justify-between, items-center. Chevron icon rotates 180deg on open.
NavigationGroup.interaction: Click to toggle. Use Framer Motion for the content height animation (0 to auto) to ensure 'massima fluidità'.

NavigationItem.description: Individual link. Flex row, items-center, gap-3, px-3 py-2.5 rounded-md.

states.active: text-white bg-white/[0.05] relative. Use a 2px left border or Framer Motion layoutId pill for the active indicator.

AlertBadge.styles: rounded-sm px-1.5 py-0.5 text-[10px] bg-[#FF3B30]/15 text-[#FF3B30] border border-[#FF3B30]/30 flex items-center justify-center
AlertBadge.animation: If count > 10 or critical, add a subtle pulse animation to the border/shadow.

UserProfileMenu.description: Located at the bottom of the sidebar. A bento-style compact button.
UserProfileMenu.styles: mt-auto border-t border-white/5 pt-4 flex items-center gap-3 w-full hover:bg-white/[0.02] p-2 rounded-lg cursor-pointer transition-colors

MobileBottomNav.description: Fixed bottom navigation for mobile view.
MobileBottomNav.items: 5 slots max. Example: Dashboard, Alert, Incidenti, Dispositivi, Menu (More).
MobileBottomNav.styles: Fixed bottom-0 w-full flex justify-around items-center pb-safe pt-2 px-2 z-50
MobileBottomNav.action: The 'Menu' item opens a Shadcn Sheet (Drawer) containing the full sidebar layout.

collapsible.content: <motion.div initial={{ height: 0, opacity: 0 }} animate={{ height: 'auto', opacity: 1 }} exit={{ height: 0, opacity: 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.25, ease: [0.16, 1, 0.3, 1] }}>

motion.microInteractions: Use scale: 0.98 on tap for navigation items. Swift color transitions (duration-150).

assets.icons: Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react). Use 'Duotone' for active items, 'Regular' for inactive items. Size 18px or 20px.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Do not use standard HTML `<details>` or Shadcn's default Accordion if it feels rigid. Implement a custom collapsible group using Framer Motion for the height transition to guarantee the requested 'massima fluidità'.
2. Group the ~25 items into a JS configuration array (e.g., `const navConfig = [...]`) to keep the component clean.

3. Apply 'Tactical Minimalism': use crisp 1px borders, avoid large muddy shadows. The active state should be clearly indicated by a bright Volt Blue (#007AFF) 2px left-border accent and higher text contrast.
4. The 'Alert' item MUST feature a red badge (e.g., '12'). Add a subtle `animate-pulse` effect to the badge if the count is high.

5. Mobile UX: Hide the sidebar on screens < md. Show a fixed Bottom Navigation Bar featuring the 4 most important routes + 1 'Menu' button. The 'Menu' button opens a `<Sheet>` from Shadcn containing the full sidebar.
6. Typography: Use `IBM Plex Mono` for the uppercase group headers (MONITORAGGIO, OPERAZIONI, etc.) with wide tracking. Use `IBM Plex Sans` for the actual links.
